metadata.description: PDDL planning and validation tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: pddl-solver
plugins.description: Solve PDDL planning problems — supports classical and numeric (PDDL 2.1) domains. Pure pip install, no Docker.

plugins.name: pddl-validator
plugins.description: Validate PDDL domains, problems, and plans — check syntax, verify plan correctness, and inspect state transitions. Pure pip install, no Docker.

plugins.name: pddl-parser
plugins.description: PDDL introspection, trajectory generation, applicability checking, and state analysis. Pure Python, no Docker.
